feed.title: Integration Ninja Cats
feed.subtitle: Your central place to start your Microsoft+SAP integration journey and keep up to date with the latest community efforts.

entry.title: The Worm in the Supply Chain How Defender for Endpoint and Sentinel for SAP BTP Caught Shai-Hulud

link.title: The Worm in the Supply Chain How Defender for Endpoint and Sentinel for SAP BTP Caught Shai-Hulud

entry.summary: In this write-up, Microsoft Defender for Endpoint and Microsoft Sentinel for SAP BTP are used together to detect and investigate supply-chain-style attack behavior, including “Shai-Hulud” patterns, across SAP-centric landscapes.

entry.title: Enhancing the Support for RISE on AWS & GCP - LogServ with Sentinel for SAP Part 5

link.title: Enhancing the Support for RISE on AWS & GCP - LogServ with Sentinel for SAP Part 5

entry.summary: Part 5 extends SAP LogServ integration coverage for Microsoft Sentinel to RISE landscapes on AWS and GCP, including ECS log-forwarding enhancements.

entry.title: Microsoft Sentinel for SAP Agentless connector GA

link.title: Microsoft Sentinel for SAP Agentless connector GA

entry.summary: Today is the day: Our new agentless connector for Microsoft Sentinel Solution for SAP applications is Generally Available now! Fully onboarded to SAP’s official Business Accelerator Hub and ready for prime time wherever your SAP systems are waiting – on-premises, hyperscalers, RISE, or GROW – to be protected.

entry.title: Run agentless SAP connector cost-efficiently
entry.summary: The SAP agentless connector uses SAP Integration Suite (Cloud Integration/CPI) to fetch SAP audit log data and forward it to Microsoft Sentinel. Because SAP CPI billing typically reflects message counts and data volume, you can tune the connector to control costs—while preserving reliability and timeliness.

entry.title: Identity and Access Management with Microsoft Entra, Part III, SuccessFactors and Role Provisioning

link.title: Identity and Access Management with Microsoft Entra, Part III, SuccessFactors and Role Provisioning

entry.summary: Part II of this blog series took a technical deep-dive into a hybrid scenario for managing identities and their access across SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) and S/4HANA on-premise. Part III enhances the scenario by introducing SAP SuccessFactors (SF) as the source for employee and user data, and leverages the new capabilities in Entra for SCIM-based provisioning to SAP Cloud Identity Se...
